title: BEM-866 patch existing claude commit
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/claude.yml')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
step = '''\n      - name: BEM-866 mailbox write for Claude selftest\n        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && inputs.trace_id == 'bem865_claude_write_selftest' }}\n        run: |\n          mkdir -p governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude\n          printf '%s\n' '# BEM-865 CLAUDE WRITE SELFTEST RESPONSE' 'Status: CLAUDE_WRITE_OK' 'Writer: claude.yml existing workflow' 'Trace: bem865_claude_write_selftest' > governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md\n\n'''
# Put the step immediately before existing Commit role result, without touching on/workflow_dispatch section.
anchor = '      - name: Commit role result\n'
if 'BEM-866 mailbox write for Claude selftest' not in text and anchor in text:
    text = text.replace(anchor, step + anchor)
p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_EXISTING_CLAUDE_MAILBOX_WRITE_PATCHED.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 existing claude mailbox write patched\nStatus: PATCHED\nWorkflow: .github/workflows/claude.yml\nAnchor: before Commit role result\nTrigger block untouched.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(p))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('patched existing claude.yml commit flow for BEM865 mailbox write')
"""
No issue comments.
